title: Running Multiple Instances of Your App — Scale Down
text:
To scale down the Deployment to 2 replicas, run again the
scale
subcommand:
kubectl scale deployments/kubernetes-bootcamp --replicas
=
2
List the Deployments to check if the change was applied with the
get deployments
subcommand:
kubectl get deployments
The number of replicas decreased to 2. List the number of Pods, with
get pods
:
kubectl get pods -o wide
This confirms that 2 Pods were terminated.
